utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes destination (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified; travel_dates (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24) – fully specified; transportation – flight details and costs clearly given; accommodation – hotel details and costs given; activities – listed with cost and duration; additional_services – included but costs are not explicitly stated (only 'Included'); total_budget – complete breakdown provided. Since additional_services lacks explicit cost information, it is incomplete. Therefore, 5 out of 6 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which directly corresponds to the destination rating of 7 in the ground-truth data. The transportation is a standard airline in economy class, which has a rating of 7. The accommodation is 'property_option3', a 3-star hotel in the city center, which corresponds most closely to mid-range options like 'Cityscape Hotel' or 'Boutique Stay'—both rated 7 or 8. Given the 3-star classification and central location, 'Cityscape Hotel' (rating 8) is the most fitting match. The activity 'City Walking Tour and Zoo Visit' combines two known activities: 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9) and 'Zoo' (rating 9). Therefore, both ratings are included. Additional services include 'travel_insurance' and 'Free cancellation until 2024-06-18', which are not explicitly rated in the ground-truth data, so no rating is mapped for them.
